name: MCP Builder — Step-by-Step MCP Server Creation
description: Build a Model Context Protocol (MCP) server that exposes tools, resources, and prompts to AI assistants. Covers stdio and HTTP transports.

name: Frontend Design — Bold UI/UX React + Tailwind
description: Design intentional, production-quality React UIs with Tailwind CSS. Avoid generic template defaults. Apply hierarchy, depth, motion, and semantic color.
source: Frontend Development Guidelines v1.0.0 — Sachidananda Panigrahi
template:
## Bold Frontend Design

### Anti-Template Rules
Never ship:
- Default card grid with uniform spacing
- Stock hero + gradient blob + generic CTA
- Flat layout with no depth or motion
- Uniform radius/shadow across every component
- Safe gray-on-white with one accent color

### Required Qualities (need at least 4)
1. Scale contrast for hierarchy
2. Intentional rhythm — not uniform padding everywhere
3. Depth via overlap, shadows, or motion
4. Typography with a real pairing strategy
5. Color used semantically, not just decoratively
6. Designed hover/focus/active states
7. Grid-breaking editorial or bento composition
8. Motion that clarifies flow (not decorates)

### Component Checklist
- [ ] Doesn't look like default Tailwind/shadcn template
- [ ] Has intentional hover/focus/active states
- [ ] Uses hierarchy, not uniform emphasis
- [ ] Would look believable in a real product screenshot

### Color System
```css
:root {
  --color-surface: oklch(98% 0 0);
  --color-text: oklch(18% 0 0);
  --color-accent: oklch(68% 0.21 250);
  --color-muted: oklch(60% 0 0);
}
```

### Typography Pairing
```css
/* Display: editorial contrast */
.heading { font-family: 'Playfair Display', serif; font-weight: 700; }
/* Body: legible workhorse */
.body { font-family: 'Inter', sans-serif; font-weight: 400; }
```

### Motion (compositor-friendly only)
```css
/* CORRECT: animate only transform + opacity */
.card { transition: transform 200ms ease-out, opacity 200ms ease-out; }
.card:hover { transform: translateY(-4px); }

/* WRONG: layout thrash */
.card:hover { height: 120%; margin-top: -10px; }
```

### Checklist
- [ ] Visual direction chosen (not "clean minimal" default)
- [ ] Palette defined intentionally
- [ ] Typography deliberately paired
- [ ] Motion stays on transform/opacity/clip-path

name: Web Artifacts Builder — Full Interactive Prototypes
description: Build complete, self-contained interactive HTML/CSS/JS prototypes. Single-file artifacts that run without a build step. Use for rapid proof-of-concept and stakeholder demos.
